run run-test  workflow task
  ok                  task/implement  2s  branch=work/x  pr=17
  skipped-dependency  task/merge  after-failure-of=task/review
  failed              task/review
  ok                  task/review-cycle@1/fix  2s  status=pushed
  ok                  task/review-cycle@1/review  2s  verdict=changes
  ok                  task/review-cycle@2/fix  2s  status=pushed
  ok                  task/review-cycle@2/review  2s  verdict=changes
  ok                  task/review-cycle@3/fix  2s  status=pushed
  ok                  task/review-cycle@3/review  2s  verdict=changes
failures:
  task/review: loop-exhausted: all 3 iterations of step "review" executed without the loop's until condition settling
    re-enter: faber resume run-test --interactive task/review
totals: 7 ok, 1 failed, 0 skipped (condition), 1 skipped (dependency); wall 2s
journal: runs/run-test/journal.jsonl
